title: Integration tests, e2e program tests, and example programs
description: Write all 24 example/test .vex programs with .expected output files in tests/testdata/programs/ (hello, fibonacci, quicksort, binary_tree, linked_list, hash_map, closures, pattern_matching, traits, generics_complex, channels_basic, channels_fanout, producer_consumer, dining_philosophers, pipeline, adt_expression, game_of_life, json_parser, brainfuck_interp, mandelbrot, red_black_tree, sieve_of_eratosthenes, graph_bfs, matrix_multiply). Implement tests/integration/e2e_test.go: compile each .vex, run in VM, compare stdout to .expected. Implement concurrency_test.go (100-fiber counter, fan-out/fan-in, pipeline, deadlock detection, 1000 fibers). Implement gc_stress_test.go (1M objects, closure chains, concurrent allocation, write barrier under GC, pause time p99 < 10ms). Implement error_message_test.go (verify all documented error formats). Implement regression_test.go (placeholder). Write 5 examples/ programs (hello, calculator, todo_list, concurrent_primes, expression_evaluator). Write benchmarks in tests/benchmark/ (lexer, parser, typecheck, codegen, VM dispatch, fibonacci, quicksort, GC pause, GC throughput, end-to-end).
